div1.entryFree:
Jangle, 1) intr. to sound discordantly: kept such a --ing of the bells, Per. II, 1, 45. Hence == to quarrel, to altercate, to wrangle: good wits will be --ing, LLL II, 225. their --ing I esteem a sport, Mids. III, 2, 353.
2) to make to sound discordantly, to put out of tune: like sweet bells --d, out of tune and harsh, Hml. III, 1, 166.
